Name: Lilayi Low-Cost Housing Scheme – Phase 1 Foundation Works Complete (50 Units)
Description: Proof-of-work milestone token for completion of strip foundations for 50 x 2-bedroom low-cost housing units at Lilayi, Lusaka. Certified by NHA site engineer and MoINFRA inspector. Contract NHA-2023-LIL.

Name: Lilayi Low-Cost Housing Scheme – Phase 2 Walling (50 Units) Complete
Description: Proof-of-work milestone token for completion of concrete block walling (wall plate level) for 50 x 2-bedroom units at Lilayi. All units certified by NHA resident engineer. Contract NHA-2023-LIL.

Name: Lilayi Low-Cost Housing Scheme – Phase 3 Roofing (50 Units) Complete
Description: Proof-of-work milestone token for IBR corrugated steel sheet roofing on all 50 units, Lilayi. Waterproofing inspection passed. Certified by NHA engineer and ZEMA housing inspector. Contract NHA-2023-LIL.

Name: Lilayi Low-Cost Housing Scheme – Phase 4 Internal Finishes (50 Units) Complete
Description: Proof-of-work milestone token for internal plastering, tile floors and ZESCO electrical connections for all 50 Lilayi units. Final snagging completed. Certified by NHA project manager. Contract NHA-2023-LIL.

Name: Ndola Affordable Housing Scheme – Foundation Works Complete (100 Units)
Description: Milestone completion for raft slab foundations for 100 x 3-bedroom medium-cost houses at Ndola New Site. Certified by NHA Copperbelt regional engineer and MLGH compliance officer. Contract NHA-2024-NDA.

Name: Ndola Affordable Housing – Walling & Roofing Complete (60 of 100 Units)
Description: Interim milestone token for 60 completed shell structures (wall plate + IBR roofing) at Ndola Affordable Housing Scheme. Structural inspections passed. Certified by NHA engineer. Contract NHA-2024-NDA.

Name: NHA Lusaka Estates Portfolio – Annual Structural Safety Inspection Certificate 2024
Description: Annual structural safety inspection certificate for 1,840 NHA-managed residential units across 9 Lusaka estates. Inspected by NHA technical team and MTech Engineering. 1,792 units pass; 48 flagged for maintenance. Valid 2025.

Name: Woodlands Extension Housing – Fire Safety Compliance Inspection Certificate 2024
Description: Fire safety compliance inspection certificate for 320 NHA Woodlands Extension housing units. Inspected per Zambia Fire Service Act. 100% pass rate for smoke detectors and fire extinguisher placement. Issued by Lusaka Fire Service.

Name: Kalingalinga Estate – Roof Replacement & Repair Programme Certificate 2024
Description: Completion certificate for roof replacement and repair programme covering 240 Kalingalinga Estate NHA units. 180 full IBR roof replacements; 60 partial patch repairs. Certified by NHA maintenance department.

Name: Matero Estate Sewerage Upgrade – Phase 1 Completion Certificate
Description: Completion certificate for sewerage pipe replacement (Phase 1) in Matero Estate. 4.2 km of 150mm uPVC sewer replaced, 8 manholes rebuilt, 320 residential connections re-lined. Certified by LWSC and NHA.

Name: NHA–TEVETA Artisan Bricklaying & Masonry Training Programme Certificate – Batch 1
Description: Completion certificate for NHA–TEVETA joint bricklaying and masonry skills training programme. 48 beneficiaries trained at NHA training centre, Lusaka. Graduates certified at TEVETA Level 2. Programme funded under TEVET Levy.

Name: NHA–TEVETA Plumbing & Pipe-Fitting Training Programme Certificate – Batch 2
Description: Completion certificate for NHA–TEVETA plumbing and pipe-fitting training. 36 beneficiaries certified at TEVETA Level 2 at NHA Copperbelt Regional Training Centre, Ndola. Funded under NHA Skills Development Fund.

Name: NHA Construction Supervision & Quality Assurance Training Certificate 2024
Description: Proof-of-work training certificate for NHA in-house Construction Supervision and QA training for 30 site managers and 12 resident engineers. Curriculum aligned with ZQSF. Completed and certified by NHA Training Division.

Name: Kitwe South Housing – Infrastructure Works Complete (Roads + Water)
Description: Milestone for 3.8 km internal estate road construction and NWASCO-approved waterworks (boreholes + 500 m³ overhead tank) for Kitwe South Housing Scheme (200 units). Certified by NHA and Kitwe City Council.

Name: Solwezi Mine Workers Housing – Shell Construction Complete (80 Units)
Description: Proof-of-work milestone for shell construction (foundation + walls + roof) for 80 NHA mine workers housing units at Solwezi. Certified by NHA North-Western regional engineer and First Quantum Minerals independent inspector.

Name: NHA Copperbelt Estates – Annual Electrical Compliance Inspection Certificate 2024
Description: Annual electrical compliance certificate for 2,100 NHA Copperbelt estate units. Inspected by ZESCO Inspectorate and NHA technical team. 1,980 units fully compliant; 120 units issued with minor non-compliance notices.

Name: Lusaka Garden Housing – External Painting & Waterproofing Certificate 2024
Description: Completion certificate for external painting (elastomeric coating) and parapet waterproofing programme for 400 Lusaka Garden NHA units. Extends asset life by 8–10 years. Certified by NHA Estate Services.

Name: NHA–NAMSEB Electrical Wiring & Installations Training – Batch 3
Description: Proof-of-work training certificate for 28 beneficiaries completing the NHA–NAMSEB electrical wiring and domestic installations programme at Lusaka Training Centre. TEVETA Level 2 accreditation. Funded by Skills Development Levy.

Name: Mpika Rural Housing Scheme – Phase 1 Site Clearing & Earthworks
Description: Milestone for site clearing (8 ha) and earthworks for Phase 1 (60 units) of Mpika Rural Housing Scheme. Includes cut-and-fill, gravel access road and NWASCO borehole siting. Certified by NHA Northern regional engineer.

Name: NHA Livingstone Estates – Waterborne Sanitation Condition Assessment Certificate
Description: Condition assessment certificate for waterborne sanitation systems across 480 NHA Livingstone estate units. Inspected per NWASCO standards. 420 units fully functional; 60 units require pipe relining. Certified by NWASCO and NHA.

Name: Choma Low-Cost Estate – Water Reticulation Upgrade Completion Certificate
Description: Completion certificate for water reticulation upgrade for 280 Choma Low-Cost Estate NHA units. Includes 3.1 km of 63 mm HDPE replacement, new pressure-reducing valves and 14 standpipe upgrades. Certified by NHA and SWSC.

Name: NHA Property Management & Tenant Relations Training Certificate 2024
Description: Completion certificate for NHA Property Management and Tenant Relations training. 55 NHA estate managers and housing officers upskilled on lease management, rent collection and tenant dispute resolution. Certified by NHA Human Resources Division.

Name: Kafue Flats Housing Project – 30-Unit Staff Housing Structural Completion
Description: Proof-of-work milestone for structural completion (shell) of 30 government staff housing units at Kafue Flats Zone. Built for ZAWA and Forestry Department employees. Certified by NHA and MLGH. Contract NHA-2024-KFH.

Name: Lusaka East Estates – Perimeter Security Fencing Replacement Certificate
Description: Completion certificate for perimeter fencing replacement programme across 5 Lusaka East NHA estates (Chelstone, Kabulonga, Roma, Woodlands East, Ibex Hill). 4.8 km of BRC mesh fencing and 240 m of palisade fencing installed. Certified by NHA.

Name: NHA Northern & Luapula Estates – Post-Rainy Season Dampness & Mould Inspection 2025
Description: Post-rainy season inspection certificate for dampness and mould in 720 NHA units across Northern and Luapula estates. 640 units clear; 80 units require treatment. Remediation schedule issued by NHA technical team. January 2025.
